case_title: RICE, BAXTER et al VS BLUTRICH, MICHAEL D. ESQ. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,369.28 FILED BY RICE, BAXTER BAXTER RICE ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT BLUTRICH, MICHAEL D. ESQ. BLUTRICH, HERMAN & MILLER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO ROBERT MILLER RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICE, BAXTER BAXTER RICE ASSOCIATES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLUTRICH, MICHAEL D. ESQ. DISMISS BLUTRICH, HERMAN & MILLER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER FROM ATTORNEY FOR MICHAEL BLUTRICH RECEIVED AND SENT TO PROTEM DEPT. 3.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICE, BAXTER BAXTER RICE ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLUTRICH, MICHAEL D. ESQ. $2,369.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,389.00, CLAIM AGAINST BLUTRICH, HERMAN & MILLER IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BLUTRICH, MICHAEL D. ESQ. BLUTRICH, HERMAN & MILLER
